summary: PR 2346 matched the grdisplay translation unit by changing grdisplay control flow and locals, updating grdisplay-related string symbol metadata, and switching melee/gr/grdisplay.c from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py. The bot report recorded two new 100% matches: grDisplay_801C5DB0 and grDisplay_801C5B90.

key_files.role: Primary decomp source changes for grDisplay_801C5B90 and grDisplay_801C5DB0.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists grDisplay_801C5DB0 and grDisplay_801C5B90 as new 100% matches

key_files.role: Build matching configuration changed melee/gr/grdisplay.c from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunk near MatchingFor Main object list

key_files.role: Updated grdisplay-adjacent string symbol names in .data and .sdata from lbl_* names to @ numbered labels.

what_changed: grDisplay_801C5B90 now stores jobj->child in a local HSD_JObj* child, checks it for non-null, tests HSD_JObjMtxIsDirty(child), and calls HSD_JObjSetupMatrixSub(child) instead of unconditionally calling HSD_JObjSetupMatrix(jobj->child).
grDisplay_801C5DB0 replaced a goto-based skip path with inverted conditional structure and early returns around gp->x18, HSD_GObj_804D7818, camera lookup, GET_COBJ, and HSD_CObjGetCurrent.
grDisplay_801C5DB0 fixed the OSReport call to pass gp->x18 for the existing "oioi... %08x" format string.
grDisplay_801C5DB0 introduced locals HSD_GObj* fighter, HSD_CObj* cobj, HSD_JObj* jobj, and u32 unused[14]; fighter was moved from the inner loop declaration to function scope.
configure.py marks Object(Matching, "melee/gr/grdisplay.c") instead of Object(NonMatching, "melee/gr/grdisplay.c").
symbols.txt renamed several string symbols from lbl_803E0730/lbl_803E073C/lbl_804D4530/lbl_804D4538/lbl_804D4540 to @209/@260/@207/@208/@210.
smart_moves: Cached GET_COBJ(camgobj) into a local cobj before comparing it with HSD_CObjGetCurrent, avoiding repeated macro/access expression shape in the final matched source.
Removed a generated-looking goto label by expressing the same skip/return behavior through a negated object comparison and early returns.
Used small role locals such as child, cobj, jobj, and fighter to make object roles explicit in grdisplay.
Kept the match status update in configure.py narrow to the single grdisplay object.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For near-matched ground display code, replacing a goto skip path with inverted conditionals and early returns can be part of the source shape that reaches a match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grDisplay_801C5DB0 removes goto skip and rewrites branch structure
text_corpus: bot report shows grDisplay_801C5DB0 reached 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a JObj child setup is conditional in the target, a local child variable plus HSD_JObjMtxIsDirty(child) and HSD_JObjSetupMatrixSub(child) may match better than an unconditional HSD_JObjSetupMatrix(jobj->child).
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report shows grDisplay_801C5B90 reached 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: A format string OSReport call should preserve the actual argument when the format expects one; here the matched source passes gp->x18 for "oioi... %08x".
evidence_refs: raw_diff: OSReport call changed from no value argument to gp->x18

naming_conventions.convention: Use short role-based locals for common HSD objects when the role is clear, such as child for a child JObj, cobj for a camera object, jobj for GET_JOBJ(gobj), and fighter for fighter GObj iteration.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added HSD_JObj* child, HSD_CObj* cobj, HSD_JObj* jobj, HSD_GObj* fighter

naming_conventions.convention: This PR changes several anonymous string symbols from lbl_* names to @number labels in symbols.txt, but the PR evidence does not explain the naming rule or whether it is broadly applicable.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduce an unused u32 unused[14] local in grDisplay_801C5DB0, likely for stack/layout matching, but no PR comment explains the reason.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report shows grDisplay_801C5DB0 reached 100.00%

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Move fighter loop variable declaration to function scope before the loop.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added HSD_GObj* fighter near top and removed inner declaration before fighter loop

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Cache GET_COBJ(camgobj) into cobj inside the branch and compare HSD_CObjGetCurrent() against that local.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added HSD_CObj* cobj and if ((cobj = GET_COBJ(camgobj)) == NULL) check

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Update configure.py only after the bot report confirms grdisplay functions reached 100% in the PR slice.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists two new matches

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: GALE01 report: matched code +0.03% (+976 bytes), linked code +0.03% (+1072 bytes), linked data +0.00% (+56 bytes), with 2 new matches: grDisplay_801C5DB0 and grDisplay_801C5B90.

evidence_refs: changed_files: three changed files with line counts
text_corpus: bot report with match deltas and new matches
notes: PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded slice.
The automated report gives match evidence, but no local build command, objdiff invocation, or author explanation is included.
The reason for u32 unused[14] is not explained by comments; treat it as a narrow matching tactic rather than style guidance.
The symbol-name changes to @number labels are visible, but the PR slice does not explain the general naming policy.

accepted_candidate_records.title: grdisplay matched via control-flow rewrite and local object caching
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2346 matched grDisplay_801C5DB0 by removing a goto skip path, using inverted conditionals and early returns, caching GET_COBJ(camgobj) in cobj, and preserving OSReport("oioi... %08x", gp->x18). The bot report records grDisplay_801C5DB0 moving from 99.58% to 100.00%.

accepted_candidate_records.title: grDisplay_801C5B90 child matrix setup match shape
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2346 matched grDisplay_801C5B90 by changing an unconditional HSD_JObjSetupMatrix(jobj->child) into a child local, null check, HSD_JObjMtxIsDirty(child), and HSD_JObjSetupMatrixSub(child). The bot report records grDisplay_801C5B90 moving from 99.85% to 100.00%.

source_update_candidates.title: grdisplay marked Matching in configure.py
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2346 changed configure.py so melee/gr/grdisplay.c is listed as Object(Matching, "melee/gr/grdisplay.c") instead of Object(NonMatching, "melee/gr/grdisplay.c").
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists grdisplay new matches
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact for current matching status; curator should verify against current source before promoting.

source_update_candidates.title: grdisplay string symbol metadata changed to @number labels
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2346 renamed lbl_803E0730/lbl_803E073C/lbl_804D4530/lbl_804D4538/lbl_804D4540 to @209/@260/@207/@208/@210 in config/GALE01/symbols.txt while preserving addresses, sections, sizes, and data:string annotations.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential symbol metadata/path fact; the PR evidence shows the changes but not the general naming rationale.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize u32 unused[14] as an accepted tactic without objdiff/build explanation; only this PR's bot report supports the final match.
Do not infer a broad rule that lbl_* string symbols should become @number labels; the slice shows only specific symbol metadata edits.
Do not claim human reviewer intent or requested changes; the loaded slice has zero review comments and an empty PR body.
